title: Small Crabs Do a Big Cleanup

content.en: Mangrove forests grow where the land and the sea meet. They are muddy!
content.tw: 紅樹林生長在陸地與海的交界處，那裡都是泥巴地。

content.en: In Colombia, the mud in a mangrove forest is dirty. It has many very small pieces of plastic in it. But, fiddler crabs are very busy there!
content.tw: 在哥倫比亞的一片紅樹林裡面，地上的泥巴藏了很多小塑膠碎片跟忙個不停的招潮蟹。

content.en: Maybe you have seen fiddler crabs in Taiwan. They are about three to five centimeters wide. Male crabs have one big claw and one small claw. Female crabs have two small claws. They live in mud. Every day, they eat mud.
content.tw: 你也許在台灣也見過招潮蟹！牠們只有大約三到五公分寬。公的招潮蟹有一隻大螯跟一隻小螯，母蟹則有兩隻小螯。招潮蟹躲在泥巴裡，每天都吃泥巴裡的微小生物。

content.en: Scientists studied some fiddler crabs in Colombia. When these crabs eat mud, they eat plastic too. This cleans the mud. There is more plastic in the crabs than in the mud!
content.tw: 科學家研究這些哥倫比亞的招潮蟹，發現牠們在吃泥巴的時候也會把塑膠一起吃進去，讓泥巴變乾淨了。

content.en: The crabs' stomach breaks plastic into smaller pieces. It does this in a few days. It does this faster than sunlight! It does this faster than ocean waves too! But too much plastic is bad for the crabs.
content.tw: 招潮蟹的胃可以把塑膠分解成更小的碎片，而且速度比用陽光或海浪分解快很多。不過，吃太多塑膠對螃蟹還是不好！

content.en: These small crabs are helping us. But they need our help too. Please recycle plastic. If you cannot, then throw it away in the right place!
content.tw: 這些小螃蟹正在幫助我們，但牠們也需要我們的幫助。請回收塑膠。如果你不能回收，請把它丟在正確的地方！

vocabulary.preface: 科學家發現招潮蟹有清潔環境的功能，並且效率高。

content.text:
1. big 大的。
What are these little creatures? 這些小東西是什麼啊? They look funny! 看起來很好玩! They are fiddler crabs. 是招潮蟹。See, one claw is very big, the other is small. 你看，一隻螯很大，一隻很小。

2. smaller 比較小的。
Even the body is smaller than the claw. 連身體都比它的螯小。Why? 為什麼? These are male crabs. 這些是公蟹。They use the big claws to fight. 牠們用大螯來戰鬥。

3. land 陸地。
Can they swim if I throw them into the sea? 如果丟進海裡，牠們會游泳嗎? No, don't do that. 不會，不要那樣。They live on land. 牠們住在陸地上。

4. mud 泥巴。
And they eat mud. Yuck! 好難吃。 I know. But they like it. 我知道，不過牠們喜歡。

vocabulary.postscript: 今天的單字你記住了嗎? big大的 smaller比較小的 land陸地 mud泥巴

quiz.question: 1. What kind of claws do male fiddler crabs have?
options: a. One small claw, one big claw

quiz.question: 3. What happens to the plastic inside the crabs?
options: b. It breaks into smaller pieces.

title: Some Warm Clothes Can Make Kids Itch

content.en: The weather is getting warmer all over Taiwan. But sometimes it is cold. What do you wear then? Hmmmm. Clothes with fleece inside are soft and warm…
content.tw: 天氣變涼的時候，穿有刷毛的衣服既柔軟又保暖！

content.en: But wearing fleece can cause problems for kids. They can get red, itchy skin! This is not comfortable. For some kids, it hurts!
content.tw: 可是，刷毛的衣服有時會讓小朋友的皮膚很不舒服！他們的皮膚會變紅、發癢，甚至會痛。

content.en: Moms and dads were worried. Why was their kid's skin itchy? Some of them took their kid to the doctor.
content.tw: 很多爸爸媽媽很擔心！為了知道小朋友皮膚癢的原因，他們還帶孩子去看醫生。

content.en: Food was not making these kids itch. Bug bites were not making them itch. Doctors said fleece clothes were making kids itch!
content.tw: 原來，小朋友皮膚癢不是因為食物過敏或是被昆蟲咬，而是因為穿了刷毛的衣服！

content.en: When kids run and play, their clothes rub their skin. When they wear fleece next to their skin, kids can get hot and itchy. Kids also sweat. This makes their itchy skin itch more!
content.tw: 當小朋友奔跑、玩耍的時候，衣服會摩擦他們的皮膚。穿刷毛的衣服時，皮膚就會被摩擦的又紅又癢！如果小朋友流汗的話，那就更癢了！

content.en: So when the weather is cold, what can you do? Doctors say wearing 100% cotton clothes is the best. Wear them next to your skin. Then you can wear fleece or other warm clothes on top of your cotton clothes.
content.tw: 那麼天氣冷的時候到底該怎麼穿呢？醫生建議，可以在最裡面穿一件100%棉質的衣服，再套刷毛或其他保暖的衣服！

content.en: You will be warm this way. And your skin will not itch!
content.tw: 這樣穿既保暖，你的皮膚也不會癢了！

vocabulary.preface: 有些保暖的衣物，可能會引起兒童皮膚過敏。

content.text:
1. weather 天氣。
Wearing a sweater today was a bad idea. 今天穿毛衣真糟糕! It's way too warm! 太熱了!
Yeah, the weather's messing with you. 你被天氣給耍了。

2. itch 發癢。
This morning was cold, and now I'm melting and itching!
今天早上還很冷，現在我都要融化了，還很癢!
You'd better lose that sweater. 你最好脫掉那件毛衣。

3. cotton 棉花。
I've got a cotton shirt in my bag. 我包包裡有棉襯杉。
You can borrow it if you don't mind. 可以借你，如果你不介意的話。

4. best 最好的。
Is it clean? 乾淨嗎?
It smells okay. 聞起來還好。
That's not very convincing… 聽起來不大有說服力。
But yeah, I guess that's the best I can get right now. 不過好吧，現在最好也只能這樣。

vocabulary.postscript:
今天的單字你記住了嗎?
weather天氣 itch發癢 cotton棉花 best最好的

quiz.question: 2. What makes itchy skin itch more?
3. What should you wear next to your skin?

title: Man Wants Big Home for Birds

content.en: In Kenya, a boy lived near a lake in a big park. Many birds lived there too.
content.tw: 在肯亞，有個小男孩住在湖邊，這個湖在大公園裡。

content.en: The boy liked watching the birds. Sometimes a bird was hurt, sick, or hungry. He tried to help them.
content.tw: 湖邊有很多鳥，小男孩喜歡看這些鳥。當發現受傷、生病、或是肚子餓的鳥，他總是想辦法幫忙。

content.en: The boy grew up. He went to live in Nairobi. Nairobi is a loud, busy city. Cars drive fast. Buildings have many windows. And power lines are everywhere.
content.tw: 小男孩長大後，搬去了奈洛比。奈洛比是個吵雜忙碌的城市，路上的車子開得很快，建築物有很多窗戶，並且到處都是電線。

content.en: The young man often saw hurt birds. They hit windows. They hit power lines. But no one helped them.
content.tw: 這名男子常常看到受傷的鳥。有的鳥會撞到窗戶或是電線，可是都沒有人伸出援手。

content.en: So the man helps birds again. He feeds them. He cares for them. But his home is very small. He cannot keep the birds until they get better.
content.tw: 於是他又開始幫助這些鳥，照顧牠們，還餵牠們吃東西。不過他的家很小，沒辦法讓鳥住到完全康復。

content.en: The man often walks with a bird on his head or shoulders. People call him the Nairobi Birdman.
content.tw: 這名男子走在路上時，頭頂或肩膀上往往停著一隻鳥，所以大家都叫他「奈洛比鳥人」。

content.en: The man wants to take care of more birds. He wants to have a big home for them. It will be a safe place for them to get better.
content.tw: 這名男子希望照顧更多小鳥，也希望有比較大的家，可以讓鳥安全地休息、慢慢好起來！

content.en: With some help, maybe the Nairobi Birdman can have a big home for birds. Then this young man can help more birds!
content.tw: 在一些幫助下，或許奈洛比鳥人可以為鳥兒們建立一個大家園。這樣這位年輕人就能幫助更多鳥兒了！

vocabulary.preface: 喜歡鳥類的小男孩，長大之後仍然努力幫助他的鳥朋友。

content.text:
1. watch 注意看。
I can't go shopping this weekend. 我這周末不能去逛街。
I'm going birdwatching. 我要去賞鳥。
Where are you going? 去哪裡?
The Botanical Garden. 植物園。

2. city 城市。
In Taipei city? 在台北市嗎?
Yeah. 對。
Birds stay there even with so many people?! 人那麼多，鳥兒還待在那裏?
They love it! There's a pond and many trees. 牠們很喜歡呢!
那裏有池塘，有好多樹。

3. place 地方。
It's a perfect place for birds. 對鳥來說很完美。

4. feed 餵食。
Do you feed them? 你會餵牠們嗎?
Nope. They're better at finding food than I am. 不，牠們找食物可比我行。

vocabulary.postscript:
Have you ever gone birdwatching?
watch注意看 city城市 place地方 feed餵食

quiz.question: 2. How do birds get hurt in the city?
3. What do people call the man?

content.en: A farm in Nantou has many cherry trees. Every year, the trees have many pink flowers. They are called cherry blossoms. Spring is the best time to see these beautiful blossoms.
content.tw: 南投有一個農場有很多櫻花樹。春天是最適合賞櫻的季節，春天一到，樹上都會開滿粉紅色的櫻花。

content.en: But this year, the sheep on the farm have another plan. To them, the blossoms look like delicious snacks!
content.tw: 但是今年這座農場裡的羊群，認為櫻花看起來像好吃的點心！

content.en: The sheep walk around the farm. They take small bites of the cherry blossoms. They eat some blossoms here. They eat some blossoms there.
content.tw: 羊群在農場裡走動，邊走邊吃櫻花。這裡吃一點，那裡也吃一點。

content.en: Soon, many cherry blossoms are gone! The wind did not blow them away. The sheep ate them!
content.tw: 沒有多久，櫻花的數量就變少了！櫻花不是被風吹落，而是被羊群吃掉了！

content.en: These sheep eat the cherry blossoms they can reach first. But they are smart. They also jump to get higher ones. They try very hard! Each sheep tries to get the last blossom!
content.tw: 這些羊會先吃離牠們比較近的花朵，但是牠們很聰明，也會跳起來吃比較高的花。牠們很努力的跳啊跳，每隻羊都想吃到最後一朵花！

content.en: People go to the farm to see cherry blossoms. And this year, they go to see the sheep too! They watch these sheep jump and eat the blossoms. It is fun! They laugh and take pictures.
content.tw: 原本只想賞花的遊客現在也會來看這些羊！大家看到跳來跳去的羊，覺得很有趣，還會笑著幫牠們拍照。

content.en: Have you seen cherry blossoms this spring? If you have not, hurry up! Or some sheep might eat them first!
content.tw: 今年春天你去看過櫻花嗎？如果你還沒去，快點喔！不然有些羊可能會先把它們吃光！

vocabulary.preface: 人類喜歡賞花，但是在羊群的眼中，花兒卻是美味的食物。

content.text:
1. cherry blossom 櫻花。
Where do you usually go for cherry blossoms? 你通常去哪裡賞櫻?
Well, I like cherries, but the blossoms? 我愛吃櫻桃，但是櫻花?
Not so much. 就沒那麼喜歡了。

2. pink 粉紅的。
Don’t you think they’re beautiful? 你不覺得它很漂亮?
Okay, they are pretty. 好吧，是很美。
The pink ones are my favorite. 我最喜歡粉紅色的。

3. flower 花。
Then why not go see them? 那為什麼不去看?
No, I wouldn’t go out of my way just for flowers. 不去，我不想專程去賞花。

4. delicious 美味的。
You’re not a romantic person, are you? 你不是個浪漫的人，對吧?
I bake delicious cherry pies. 我會烤美味的櫻桃派。
Does that make me romantic? 這樣算不算浪漫?

vocabulary.postscript:
今天的單字很可愛。
cherry blossom櫻花 pink粉紅的 flower花 delicious美味的

quiz.question: 2. When is the best time to see cherry blossoms?
3. Why are many cherry blossoms gone on the farm?
options: b. The wind blew them away.
